message:
fix(gateway): bug fixes found during code review

Fixes discovered during fresh-eyes code review:

1. Route order bug in conflicts.ts:
   - Moved /conflicts/config routes BEFORE /:conflictId
   - Previously "config" was matched as a conflictId parameter

2. Missing cleanup in agent termination handler:
   - Added stopAutoCheckpoint() call when handling driver termination events
   - Prevents interval timers from leaking for terminated agents

3. Dead code removal in conflict.service.ts:
   - Removed unused GitConflict interface
   - Removed unused lastAlertTime Map variable

4. Inefficient stats calculation in conflict.service.ts:
   - Consolidated duplicate loops through conflictHistory
   - Now single pass for both last24h and resolved24h counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
